use_cases: Displaying time-based activity patterns across days and hours with color-coded intensity
Showing statistical metrics with animated counters and trend comparisons
Dashboard analytics visualization for user engagement and performance monitoring
Comparing metric values with visual trend indicators and percentage changes
Data-driven decision making with animated statistical summaries and heatmap insights
ai_summary: A Reaviz-powered hexagonal heatmap visualization component that displays time-based activity data with animated statistical counters, trend indicators, and color-coded metrics. Features CountUp animations for numbers and framer-motion transitions. Designed for analytics dashboards showing engagement patterns, usage metrics, or performance data with visual trend analysis using a clean flat design with coral and teal accent colors.
